name: Abigail Buchanan
ai_summary: Abigail has 8 years of experience working with children from newborns to age 8, primarily through caring for nieces and nephews. She is a patient, engaging caregiver who enjoys helping kids learn and develop through activities, located in Orem, UT with availability on Mondays, Tuesdays, and Fridays.

transcripts.q3: My name is Abigail Buchanan. I've worked with kids from newborn to about 8 years. Old is where like I have the most experience with my nieces and nephews, I enjoy working with kids. I enjoy helping them learn. I have consistently helped my six-year-old niece how to read and work on her schooling. And I just really enjoy being around kids.
transcripts.q4: I live in Orem Utah and I am willing to work any like about 15-20 minutes away from Orem.
transcripts.q5: I would like to work part-time and just be able to pick up shifts as needed. My days that I'm available are Monday Tuesdays and Fridays.
transcripts.q6:
In my experience, I have been able to separate the two kids and talk to them. Separately, I found that that's what typically works best. So I talked to them separately and they each tell me what happened, how like we got there, if they were fighting over a toy like why they acted out the way they did? And then from there, I can usually talk the talk to
 Them together and they apologize to each other and tell me that they'll work on being nicer and sharing. If like, the toy was why they ended up hitting and that's typically what works for me and the kids that I work with.
transcripts.q7:
I think that I would make a good up kid teacher because I really enjoyed being around kids, I love helping them learn. I very much enjoy like doing different activities with kids. I can be their understanding when it comes to children and why they're acting out the way I'd like. Why baited I when I was growing up I always wanted that from an adult for someone to be
 Her standing and to listen to me and take their time with me. And that's something that I'm willing to do. So I just want to be that adult for kids that I never had growing up.
